# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin-access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 8001

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_80
    address:
      socket_address:
        protocol: HTTP
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@{http_conn_man}'
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: local_service
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/api/*'
                route:
                  cluster: backend_cluster
  clusters:
  - name: backend_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: static
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                protocol: TCP
                address: backend_service
                port_value: 8080
  routes:
  - match:
      prefix: '/api/*'
    route:
      cluster: backend_cluster

  http_filters:
  - name: envoy.filters.http.router

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_443
    address:
      socket_address:
        protocol: TCP
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 443
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@{http_conn_man}'
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: local_service
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/api/*'
                route:
                  cluster: backend_cluster
          tls_context:
            tls_certificates:
              envoy_tls_certificate:
                filename: /path/to/tls.crt
                privateKeyFilename: /path/to/tls.key
            validate_days: 30
  clusters:
  - name: backend_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: static
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                protocol: TCP
                address: backend_service
                port_value: 8080

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_80
    address:
      socket_address:
        protocol: TCP
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@{http_conn_man}'
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: local_service
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/api/*'
                route:
                  cluster: backend_cluster

routes:
- match:
    prefix: '/api/*'
  route:
    cluster: backend_cluster

http_filters:
- name: envoy.filters.http.router
